title: RSS 2.0 Channel
description: Schema describing the top-level <channel> element of an RSS 2.0 feed per the RSS Advisory Board specification at https://www.rssboard.org/rss-specification. The channel is the container for the feed's metadata and a sequence of items.

title.description: The name of the channel — typically matches the corresponding website's title.

link.description: The URL to the HTML website corresponding to the channel.

description.description: Phrase or sentence describing the channel.

language.description: Language the channel is written in (RFC 5646 language tag or W3C ISO 639 short code).

copyright.description: Copyright notice for content in the channel.

managingEditor.description: Email address (and optional name) for the person responsible for editorial content.

webMaster.description: Email address for the person responsible for technical issues relating to the channel.

pubDate.description: Publication date for the content in the channel, formatted per RFC 822.

lastBuildDate.description: Last time the content of the channel changed, formatted per RFC 822.

category.description: Categories that the channel belongs to. Each may optionally carry a domain attribute identifying the taxonomy.

generator.description: String indicating the program used to generate the channel.

docs.description: URL pointing to documentation for the RSS format used (typically the RSS spec itself).

cloud.description: Allows processes to register with a cloud to be notified of channel updates (rssCloud).

ttl.description: Time to live — number of minutes that indicates how long a channel can be cached before refreshing from the source.

image.description: Image that can be displayed with the channel.

rating.description: PICS content rating for the channel.

textInput.description: Specifies a text input box that can be displayed with the channel.

skipHours.description: Hours (0–23 UTC) when aggregators may skip reading the channel.

skipDays.description: Days when aggregators may skip reading the channel.
